name: PT Dyandra Media International Tbk
summary: PT Dyandra Media International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides event solutions in Indonesia. The company organizes events and exhibitions; and provides supporting events. It also operates venues and halls, including convention and exhibition halls; and hotels. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dyandra Media International Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Teletransmedia.
